title: Business Value Proof at Enterprise Scale
summary: Largest and most measurable evidence supporting Joz's business-value positioning.
claims: Joz's business-value positioning is supported by measurable transformation across enterprise and national-scale organisations.
The strongest proof should be selected based on relevance rather than presented as an undifferentiated achievement list.
Enterprise-scale outcomes should rank above smaller current experiments.
proof_points: Maybank–Ageas Etiqa: 20× digital sales growth within 12 months.
Mediacorp: 30× monthly active audience growth across a mobile-first transformation.
Publicis: 70% reduction in design-to-engineering handoff friction.
Erste Bank: engineering and accessibility work serving 16M+ customers.
Manulife: Lean ML UX practice across 11 markets and executive-level transformation.
